h1:
Let AI trade
any market
for you
hero_sub: iEarn.Bot runs locally on your machine. Your keys, your funds, your rules. Paste an article link — AI generates a full strategy with risk controls and runs it automatically.
how_sub: No cloud accounts. No seed phrase uploads. Everything runs on your Mac or Linux machine.
st1d: Run the setup script. It installs dependencies, sets up your .env, and registers auto-start jobs.
st2d: Paste your API key or private key locally. We never see it. Supports Polymarket, crypto exchanges, futures & stock markets.
dl_sub: Choose your platform. Deploy locally. Run forever free.
dl_cli: Command-line setup via git clone + bash setup.sh.
dl_chrome: One-click strategy generation from any webpage. Monitor positions from your browser toolbar.
st3t: Paste an article — AI builds your strategy
st3d: Paste a link from X or YouTube, or paste text directly. AI reads it and generates a full strategy with risk controls and a visual parameter editor.
st4d: Open http://localhost:7799 in your browser. See P&L, positions, and strategy health in real time.
feat_sub: Built for traders who want automation without giving up control.
f1d: Your private key never leaves your machine. Stored in a local .env file with chmod 600. We literally cannot touch your funds.
f2d: Paste an X post, YouTube link, or any text. AI reads it and generates a full strategy with entry/exit rules, risk parameters and a visual parameter editor — ready to deploy instantly.
f3d: Top up once with BNB Chain USDT. Each AI call costs ~0.01 USDT, auto-deducted. No subscription. No signup. 95% goes to the developer.
f4d: Beautiful v2 dashboard at localhost:7799. KPI cards, position tracking, daily P&L, strategy health — all in your browser, no cloud needed.
f5d: Submit any market URL — AI auto-generates a plug-in adapter. Supports Polymarket, crypto, futures, options, and stock markets worldwide.
f6d: Built-in evolution engine analyzes wins/losses, auto-adjusts stop-loss levels, disables losing market types, and raises liquidity thresholds.
f7d: Max position, max daily loss, max drawdown, trailing stop, cooldown period, order size limits, and one-click kill-switch. All configurable per strategy.
f8d: Run strategies manually or on a schedule: every N minutes, hours, days, weeks, or months. APScheduler-powered with kill-switch integration and state persistence.
f9d: Full source on GitHub. Audit the code yourself. Fork it, extend it, build on top of it. No black boxes.
sp_h2:
Top up once.
Pay per AI call.
sp_desc: SkillPay is a BNB Chain billing layer built for AI Skills. Top up your balance once with USDT — iEarn.Bot auto-deducts per call. No accounts, no subscriptions, no credit cards.
sp_note: No KYC · No registration · 95% revenue to iEarn.Bot developer
fl5d: Auto-returns topup link → pay USDT → continue
pr_sub: Deploy once, run forever free locally.
t1_desc: $9.9 / strategy · Deploy once, run forever free · 3 free AI modifications
t3_desc: $19.9 / year · Unlimited strategies · Bring your own LLM API
t3_f4: Bring your own LLM API key
t3_note: Requires your own LLM API key
inst_sub: macOS and Linux supported. Python 3.11+ required.
inst_warn: ⚠️ Only deposit what you can afford to lose. This is experimental software. DYOR.
a1: Yes. Your private key is stored only in a local .env file on your machine, with chmod 600 permissions. iEarn.Bot servers never receive, see, or store your key. SkillPay billing uses your wallet address as a user ID — no signup, no KYC.
a2: Polymarket is the world's largest prediction market platform, built on Polygon. You trade on outcomes like \"Will BTC hit $100k?\" — buying YES or NO positions. iEarn.Bot automates this using configurable strategies.
q3: How much money do I need to start?
a3: Minimum ~$50 USDC.e on Polygon to get started. You'll also need a tiny amount of POL (~$0.01) for gas fees. We recommend starting small while you learn how the strategies perform.
q4: Can I run multiple strategies at once?
a4: Yes. V1, V2, and V3 run independently on separate schedules. You can also add custom V4+ strategies that run in parallel. Each strategy has independent stop-loss and take-profit settings.
a5: No. Prediction markets are speculative and iEarn.Bot is experimental software. Past performance doesn't guarantee future results. Only use funds you can afford to lose entirely. DYOR.
a6: Currently Polymarket (prediction markets). Binance and Kalshi adapters are in development. We only support regulated, globally recognized exchanges — unlisted or unregulated platforms are blocked by design.
a7: No. iEarn.Bot is built for non-technical users. Just paste a URL or describe your idea in plain language — AI handles strategy generation, deployment, and execution automatically.
q8: What happens after I deploy a strategy?
a8: The strategy runs locally on your machine — completely offline from our servers. Your funds, your rules. You can monitor it on the dashboard, pause it anytime, or set automatic stop-loss / take-profit limits.
a9: Yes. iEarn.Bot is fully open source under the MIT License. Anyone can audit, fork, or contribute. See our Open Source Manifesto for the full story.
q10: How is the Mini plan different from Pro?
a10: Mini is pay-per-deploy ($9.9 per strategy, 3 free modifications). Pro is a monthly subscription ($19/month, up to 10 strategies total, 6 free modifications each). Both plans run locally forever after deployment — no ongoing charges.
footer: © 2026 iEarn.Bot — MIT License — Built with ❤️ and USDC
